core_rule: 장소·캐릭터 SSOT는 thumbnail과 동일하나, 텍스트 영역·overlay는 일체 사용하지 않는다.

scene.description: A quiet outdoor harbor in Yeosu at night, beside the red Hamel Lighthouse standing on the harbor breakwater, overlooking the open sea.
must_include: solid vivid red Hamel Lighthouse — saturated bold beacon-like red, never faded, never orange-red, never pink-red
lighthouse positioned right-of-center as the emotional anchor
harbor breakwater (방파제) — the emotional walking path, straight or natural perspective
metal/concrete railings on BOTH sides of the breakwater — clearly visible as emotional flow lines
leading-line walking path on the breakwater leading toward the red lighthouse
distant Yeosu city lights reflected softly on water

forbidden: any Korean text, hangul characters, or letters anywhere in the image
weak red, faded red, orange-red, or pink-red lighthouse
lighthouse at left edge or far background
face visible from front or side
hair style or color change from shoulder-length dark hair

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: shoulder-length dark hair, slim body, back view or slight 3/4 back only, no facial detail
character.pose: quietly standing on the breakwater path — never running, never seeking, never crouching
character.description: Sowoni stands quietly in the left-foreground on the breakwater path, back view or 3/4 back, gently looking toward the red lighthouse light — emotionally connected, not actively walking, never running.
character.rule: Sowoni is the emotional and visual center, not visually dominant. No mascot character. No star in hands. SSOT §8-1: 머무르고 / 정리하고 / 별들을 바라보고 / 감정을 연결하는 존재.

composition.flow: Sowoni quietly standing in left-foreground on breakwater path → railings as emotional flow lines on both sides → red lighthouse anchor at right-center → sea horizon → single star above
composition.core: vertical 9:16 portrait orientation, low eye-level camera at breakwater entrance, Sowoni emotionally central but not visually dominant
composition.viewpoint: camera positioned at the start of the breakwater, eye-level just above the path, looking toward the red lighthouse
composition.aspect_ratio: 9:16 vertical portrait — never square, never landscape
mood: The breakwater feels like a quiet emotional journey.
The lighthouse supports the emotional scene but does not dominate the composition.
The scene should feel emotionally intimate rather than scenic.
The emotional atmosphere is more important than environmental detail.
Sowoni feels emotionally connected to the lighthouse light.
The red lighthouse light reads as a hopeful beacon, not a tourist landmark.
Sowoni is quietly present — not running, not seeking, not pursuing destination.

text_strategy.policy: do not generate any Korean text inside the image
text_strategy.name_plate: rendered as post-processing overlay (sharp + opentype.js with assets/fonts/NotoSansKR-*.ttf, or static PNG asset)
text_strategy.rationale: current AI image generation models cannot reliably render Korean text consistently — see Visual_Style_SSOT §8-1
text_strategy.lighthouse_body: must remain clean of any text or markings to allow post-processing overlay

emotion_overrides._note: wish-image 전용 emotion → gem/starlight 매핑. thumbnail 매핑과 별개. 미정의 emotion은 thumbnail utils의 기본값으로 fallback.

confusion.starlight: deep sapphire blue tinged with quiet uncertainty — calm but searching, not pulsing — 푸른 별빛, 깊은 사색

asset_routing._note: 검수/QA는 outputs/wish-image/, 확정 자산은 star-cache로. production overwrite 금지 — star-cache는 local only (push 대상 아님).
